docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-22-2023 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY DIAZ, ADAM AS TO DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-22-2023 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-03-2023, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ADAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC PLAINTIFF DID NOT HAVE EVIDENCE TO MEET THE BURDEN OF PROOF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ADAM

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-22-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-22-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY. PLAINTIFF ADAM DIAZ APPEARED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT DOORDASH, INC. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM PANG LY, CLERK: A. MOK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DIAZ, ADAM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
